<!doctype html>
<html lang="ko"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><title>판매의 신 ONE-FOLDER</title>
<style>
:root{--bg:#170f0a;--panel:#2a1a10;--wood:#5b3820;--wood2:#3a2315;--gold:#e0b65b;--gold2:#9f6c24;--cream:#f7ecd3;--red:#8f312e;--green:#3f7c54;--blue:#466d8e;--line:#160d08;--muted:#cbb793;--shadow:0 12px 32px #0009}*{box-sizing:border-box}html,body{margin:0;min-height:100%;font-family:Arial,"Noto Sans KR",sans-serif;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0,#51331e,#140c08 70%);color:var(--cream)}button,input{font:inherit}button{cursor:pointer}.hidden{display:none!important}.login{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(#0005,#0008),url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover}.login-card{width:min(460px,94vw);padding:34px;border:5px solid #1b1009;background:linear-gradient(#4e301c,#25160d);box-shadow:var(--shadow);text-align:center}.logo{font-size:54px;font-weight:1000;color:var(--gold);text-shadow:0 4px #3b210c}.login input{width:100%;padding:14px;margin:18px 0;border:3px solid var(--gold2);background:#fff6df;color:#25160d}.gold{border:3px solid #25160d;padding:13px 18px;background:linear-gradient(#e4bd64,#9b6b28);font-weight:1000;color:#2a190d;box-shadow:0 5px 0 #1d1008}.app{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto}.hud{display:grid;grid-template-columns:240px repeat(4,1fr) auto;gap:8px;padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:5px solid #160d08;background:linear-gradient(#4b2e1a,#2b190e);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:30}.brand b{display:block;font-size:27px;color:var(--gold)}.brand small{color:var(--muted)}.stat{padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid #6c4725;background:#24150c}.stat span{display:block;color:#cdb88e;font-size:11px}.stat b{font-size:17px}.hud button{border:2px solid #6c4725;background:#2b1a0f;color:#fff}.main{display:grid;grid-template-columns:250px minmax(520px,1fr) 330px;gap:12px;padding:12px;min-height:0}.panel{border:4px solid #180e08;background:linear-gradient(#57361f,#2e1b10);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.missions{padding:16px}.missions h2,.item-side h2{margin:0 0 14px;color:var(--gold);text-align:center}.mission{padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;border:2px solid #76502b;background:#24150d}.bar{height:12px;border:2px solid #140b07;background:#0e0805;overflow:hidden}.bar i{display:block;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8f312e,#e0b65b,#3f7c54)}.market-board{margin-top:18px;padding:12px;border:3px solid #1a0f09;background:#1d120b}.market-board p{display:flex;justify-content:space-between}.up{color:#7ec487}.down{color:#78aee0}.scene{display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr auto;min-width:0}.shop{position:relative;min-height:590px;overflow:hidden;border:5px solid #160d08;background:#3b2618}.shop:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(#0001,#0007),url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover;filter:saturate(.9) contrast(1.04)}.shop:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:110px;background:linear-gradient(#754722,#3d2413);border-top:8px solid #180e08}.npc-tag{position:absolute;left:34px;bottom:136px;z-index:3;padding:8px 16px;border:4px solid #180e08;background:var(--red);font-weight:1000}.dialogue{position:absolute;left:24px;right:24px;bottom:20px;z-index:4;padding:20px 24px;border:5px solid #180e08;background:#fff2d2;color:#2c1a0d;box-shadow:0 7px 0 #180e08}.dialogue b{font-size:18px}.inventory-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:40px 1fr 40px;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:10px;background:#2a190e;border:4px solid #160d08;border-top:0}.carousel{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:7px;overflow:hidden}.item-card{min-width:0;padding:8px;border:3px solid #24150d;background:linear-gradient(#f3dfb9,#caa46c);color:#2a190d;text-align:left}.item-card.selected{outline:4px solid var(--gold)}.item-art{display:grid;place-items:center;height:92px;margin:7px 0;border:2px solid #72502e;background:radial-gradient(circle,#fff4da,#bd8d53);font-size:56px}.item-card small,.item-card b{display:block;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.arrow{height:52px;border:3px solid #160d08;background:#8b5a26;color:#fff;font-size:30px}.item-side{padding:14px}.focus-card{padding:12px;border:3px solid #160d08;background:#ead3a8;color:#2c1a0d}.focus-art{display:grid;place-items:center;height:230px;background:radial-gradient(circle,#fff8e9,#b98a4f);border:3px solid #6b4627;font-size:130px}.focus-card h3{margin:10px 0 2px;font-size:24px}.price{font-size:28px;color:#8d2f2b;font-weight:1000}.actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:12px}.actions button{padding:13px;border:3px solid #180e08;color:#fff;font-weight:1000}.sell{background:var(--green)}.bargain{background:#b27624}.reject{background:var(--red)}.nav{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:6px;padding:8px;border-top:5px solid #160d08;background:#2b190e;position:sticky;bottom:0;z-index:30}.nav button{padding:10px;border:3px solid #160d08;background:linear-gradient(#74502d,#3b2414);color:#fff}.nav span{display:block;font-size:12px}.modal{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:18px;background:#000c}.window{position:relative;width:min(1050px,96vw);max-height:92vh;overflow:auto;padding:22px;border:5px solid #160d08;background:linear-gradient(#5a3820,#2d1b10);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.close{position:absolute;right:10px;top:10px;width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid #160d08;background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-size:24px}.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px}.modal-card{padding:10px;border:3px solid #160d08;background:#ead3a8;color:#2c1a0d}.modal-card .item-art{height:130px;font-size:75px}.modal-card button{width:100%;margin-top:8px;padding:9px;border:2px solid #160d08;background:#6c4525;color:#fff}.auction{display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px 1fr;gap:18px}.auction-log{height:210px;overflow:auto;padding:10px;background:#160d08;color:#e8d3ad;border:2px solid #7a512a}.toast{position:fixed;right:18px;bottom:90px;z-index:200;padding:14px 18px;border:3px solid #160d08;background:#fff1ce;color:#2b190e;box-shadow:var(--shadow);opacity:0;transform:translateY(15px);transition:.2s}.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:none}@media(max-width:1100px){.hud{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr}.brand{grid-column:1/-1}.main{grid-template-columns:1fr}.missions{display:none}.item-side{order:2}.scene{order:1}.grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}@media(max-width:700px){.hud{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.main{padding:5px}.shop{min-height:480px}.carousel{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.nav{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.auction{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
</style></head><body>
<div id="toast" class="toast"></div>
<section id="login" class="login"><div class="login-card"><div class="logo">판매의 신</div><p>500개의 물건으로 전설의 흥정가가 되어라</p><input id="nameInput" maxlength="12" placeholder="상인 이름"><button class="gold" onclick="startGame()">게임 시작</button><p><small>설치·빌드·서버 설정 없이 index.html 하나로 실행됩니다.</small></p></div></section>
<section id="app" class="app hidden"><header class="hud"><div class="brand"><b>판매의 신</b><small id="ownerText">전당포 초보 사장</small></div><div class="stat"><span>현금</span><b id="cashText"></b></div><div class="stat"><span>신용도</span><b id="creditText"></b></div><div class="stat"><span>평판</span><b id="repText"></b></div><div class="stat"><span>총자산</span><b id="assetText"></b></div><button onclick="resetGame()">초기화</button></header>
<main class="main"><aside class="missions panel"><h2>오늘의 목표</h2><div class="mission"><b>물건 2개 판매</b><div class="bar"><i id="sellBar"></i></div><span id="sellMission"></span><em> +50,000원</em></div><div class="mission"><b>흥정 3회 성공</b><div class="bar"><i id="dealBar"></i></div><span id="dealMission"></span><em> 신용도 +10</em></div><div class="market-board"><h3>오늘의 시세</h3><p>골동품 <span class="up">▲ 5%</span></p><p>전자기기 <span class="down">▼ 3%</span></p><p>보석 <span class="up">▲ 7%</span></p><p>기타 <span>→ 0%</span></p></div></aside>
<section class="scene"><div class="shop"><div class="npc-tag">전당포 손님</div><div class="dialogue"><b id="dialogueTitle">이 물건, 제값을 받을 수 있겠소?</b><p id="dialogueText">당신의 눈썰미와 흥정 실력을 보여주시오.</p></div></div><div class="inventory-strip"><button class="arrow" onclick="moveCarousel(-1)">‹</button><div id="carousel" class="carousel"></div><button class="arrow" onclick="moveCarousel(1)">›</button></div></section>
<aside class="item-side panel"><h2>감정할 물건</h2><div class="focus-card"><div id="focusArt" class="focus-art"></div><h3 id="focusName"></h3><small id="focusMeta"></small><p>상태 <b id="conditionText"></b></p><div class="bar"><i id="conditionBar"></i></div><p>예상 시세</p><div id="priceText" class="price"></div></div><div class="actions"><button class="sell" onclick="sellAtBase()">원가 판매</button><button class="bargain" onclick="openBargain()">흥정하기</button><button class="reject" onclick="rejectItem()">거절하기</button></div></aside></main>
<nav class="nav"><button onclick="showView('pawn')">🏪<span>전당포</span></button><button onclick="showView('auction')">🔨<span>경매장</span></button><button onclick="showView('market')">🛒<span>중고장터</span></button><button onclick="showView('bag')">🎒<span>내 가방</span></button><button onclick="showView('phone')">📱<span>휴대폰</span></button><button onclick="showView('house')">🏠<span>내 집</span></button></nav></section>
<div id="modal" class="modal hidden" onclick="backdrop(event)"><div class="window"><button class="close" onclick="closeModal()">×</button><div id="modalContent"></div></div></div>

블럼","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":229000,"rarity":"일반","condition":72},{"id":"item_484","name":"오래된번호판","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":158000,"rarity":"일반","condition":89},{"id":"item_485","name":"차량용라디오","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":220000,"rarity":"일반","condition":45},{"id":"item_486","name":"대시보드시계","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":150000,"rarity":"일반","condition":62},{"id":"item_487","name":"사이드미러","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":211000,"rarity":"일반","condition":79},{"id":"item_488","name":"기어노브","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":141000,"rarity":"일반","condition":35},{"id":"item_489","name":"후드장식","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":202000,"rarity":"일반","condition":52},{"id":"item_490","name":"자동차매뉴얼","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":132000,"rarity":"일반","condition":69},{"id":"item_491","name":"휴대용공기주입기","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":348000,"rarity":"희소","condition":86},{"id":"item_492","name":"점프케이블","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":459000,"rarity":"희소","condition":42},{"id":"item_493","name":"정비공구세트","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":333000,"rarity":"희소","condition":59},{"id":"item_494","name":"오일캔","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":444000,"rarity":"희소","condition":76},{"id":"item_495","name":"자동차모형키","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":317000,"rarity":"희소","condition":93},{"id":"item_496","name":"택시미터기","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":760000,"rarity":"진귀","condition":49},{"id":"item_497","name":"버스안내판","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":535000,"rarity":"진귀","condition":66},{"id":"item_498","name":"차량용재떨이","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":732000,"rarity":"진귀","condition":83},{"id":"item_499","name":"루프캐리어","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":950000,"rarity":"보물","condition":39},{"id":"item_500","name":"빈티지헬멧","icon":"🚗","category":"차량용품","basePrice":2200000,"rarity":"전설","condition":56}];
const KEY='selling_god_one_folder_v1';
const START_IDS=CATALOG.slice(0,5).map(x=>x.id);
const DEFAULT={nickname:'판매왕',cash:500000,credit:65,rep:2,xp:120,inventory:[...START_IDS],selected:START_IDS[0],sold:0,deals:0,carousel:0,claimedSell:false,claimedDeal:false};
let state=load(), bargain=null, auction=null, auctionTimer=null;
function load(){try{return Object.assign({},DEFAULT,JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(KEY)||'{}'))}catch(e){return Object.assign({},DEFAULT)}}
function save(){localStorage.setItem(KEY,JSON.stringify(state));renderAll()}
function startGame(){const n=nameInput.value.trim();if(n)state.nickname=n;login.classList.add('hidden');app.classList.remove('hidden');save()}
function resetGame(){if(confirm('저장된 진행을 초기화할까요?')){localStorage.removeItem(KEY);location.reload()}}
function money(v){return Math.round(Number(v)||0).toLocaleString()+'원'}
function item(id){return CATALOG.find(x=>x.id===id)}function inv(){return state.inventory.map(item).filter(Boolean)}function selected(){return item(state.selected)||inv()[0]||CATALOG[0]}
function imageArt(i){return `<div class="item-art" title="${esc(i.name)}">${i.icon||'📦'}</div>`}
function esc(s){return String(s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[c]))}
function asset(){return state.cash+inv().reduce((s,x)=>s+x.basePrice,0)}
function renderAll(){ownerText.textContent=state.nickname+'의 전당포';cashText.textContent=money(state.cash);creditText.textContent=state.credit+'/100';repText.textContent='Lv.'+state.rep;assetText.textContent=money(asset());sellMission.textContent=Math.min(2,state.sold)+' / 2';dealMission.textContent=Math.min(3,state.deals)+' / 3';sellBar.style.width=Math.min(100,state.sold/2*100)+'%';dealBar.style.width=Math.min(100,state.deals/3*100)+'%';renderFocus();renderCarousel()}
function renderFocus(){const i=selected();state.selected=i.id;focusArt.textContent=i.icon||'📦';focusName.textContent=i.name;focusMeta.textContent=i.category+' · '+i.rarity;conditionText.textContent=i.condition+'/100';conditionBar.style.width=i.condition+'%';priceText.textContent=money(adjusted(i))}
function adjusted(i){let m=1;if(i.category.includes('골동'))m=1.05;if(i.category.includes('전자'))m=.97;if(i.category.includes('보석'))m=1.07;return Math.round(i.basePrice*(.55+i.condition/220)*m)}
function renderCarousel(){const a=inv(),max=Math.max(0,a.length-4);state.carousel=Math.min(max,Math.max(0,state.carousel));carousel.innerHTML=a.slice(state.carousel,state.carousel+4).map(i=>`<button class="item-card ${i.id===state.selected?'selected':''}" onclick="selectItem('${i.id}')"><b>${esc(i.name)}</b><small>${esc(i.category)} · ${esc(i.rarity)}</small>${imageArt(i)}<small>상태 ${i.condition}/100</small><b>${money(adjusted(i))}</b></button>`).join('')||'<p>가방이 비었습니다.</p>'}
function selectItem(id){state.selected=id;save()}function moveCarousel(d){state.carousel+=d;save()}
function removeSelected(){const id=state.selected;state.inventory=state.inventory.filter(x=>x!==id);state.selected=state.inventory[0]||CATALOG[0].id}
function sellAtBase(){if(!state.inventory.includes(state.selected))return toast('판매할 물건이 없습니다.');const i=selected(),p=adjusted(i);state.cash+=p;state.sold++;removeSelected();missions();save();toast(i.name+' 판매 완료 '+money(p))}
function rejectItem(){dialogueTitle.textContent='좋소. 다른 물건을 보도록 하지.';dialogueText.textContent='거래를 거절했습니다. 가방에서 다른 아이템을 골라 보세요.'}
function openBargain(){if(!state.inventory.includes(state.selected))return toast('흥정할 물건이 없습니다.');const i=selected(),base=adjusted(i);bargain={id:i.id,offer:Math.round(base*1.05),limit:Math.round(base*(1.18+Math.random()*.2)),patience:3};modal.classList.remove('hidden');renderBargain()}
function renderBargain(){const i=item(bargain.id),r=bargain.offer/bargain.limit;modalContent.innerHTML=`<h1>가격 흥정</h1><div class="auction"><div>${imageArt(i)}<h2>${esc(i.name)}</h2></div><div><h2>${r<.78?'그 정도면 들어볼 만하군.':r<.94?'욕심이 좀 있군. 그래도 계속해 보지.':'한 번만 더 무리하면 거래는 끝이오.'}</h2><p>현재 제안가 <span class="price">${money(bargain.offer)}</span></p><p>남은 인내심 ${bargain.patience}</p><div class="actions"><button class="bargain" onclick="raise(5)">+5% 제안</button><button class="bargain" onclick="raise(10)">+10% 제안</button><button class="sell" onclick="acceptDeal()">이 가격에 판매</button></div></div></div>`}
function raise(p){const next=Math.round(bargain.offer*(1+p/100));bargain.patience--;if(next<=bargain.limit){bargain.offer=next;toast('상대가 제안을 받아들였습니다.')}else toast('가격 인상을 거절했습니다.');if(bargain.patience<=0&&next>bargain.limit){closeModal();bargain=null;return toast('흥정 결렬')}renderBargain()}
function acceptDeal(){const i=item(bargain.id),p=bargain.offer;state.cash+=p;state.sold++;state.deals++;state.credit=Math.min(100,state.credit+2);removeSelected();missions();bargain=null;closeModal();save();toast(i.name+' 흥정 성공 '+money(p))}
function missions(){if(state.sold>=2&&!state.claimedSell){state.claimedSell=true;state.cash+=50000;toast('판매 목표 달성 +50,000원')}if(state.deals>=3&&!state.claimedDeal){state.claimedDeal=true;state.credit=Math.min(100,state.credit+10);toast('흥정 목표 달성 신용도 +10')}}
function showView(v){if(v==='pawn')return;modal.classList.remove('hidden');if(v==='market')marketView();if(v==='bag')bagView();if(v==='auction')auctionView();if(v==='phone')phoneView();if(v==='house')houseView()}
function marketView(){const picks=[...CATALOG].sort(()=>Math.random()-.5).slice(0,20);modalContent.innerHTML='<h1>중고장터</h1><p>총 500종 중 오늘의 매물 20개</p><div class="grid">'+picks.map(i=>`<div class="modal-card"><b>${esc(i.name)}</b>${imageArt(i)}<p>${esc(i.category)} · 상태 ${i.condition}</p><strong>${money(Math.round(adjusted(i)*1.12))}</strong><button onclick="buy('${i.id}')">구매</button></div>`).join('')+'</div>'}
function buy(id){const i=item(id),p=Math.round(adjusted(i)*1.12);if(state.cash<p)return toast('현금이 부족합니다.');state.cash-=p;state.inventory.push(i.id);state.selected=i.id;save();toast(i.name+' 구매 완료');marketView()}
function bagView(){modalContent.innerHTML='<h1>내 가방</h1><div class="grid">'+inv().map(i=>`<div class="modal-card"><b>${esc(i.name)}</b>${imageArt(i)}<p>${esc(i.category)} · ${esc(i.rarity)}</p><strong>${money(adjusted(i))}</strong><button onclick="selectItem('${i.id}');closeModal()">전당포에 올리기</button></div>`).join('')+'</div>'}
function phoneView(){modalContent.innerHTML=`<h1>휴대폰</h1><div class="grid"><div class="modal-card"><h3>현금</h3><div class="price">${money(state.cash)}</div></div><div class="modal-card"><h3>총자산</h3><div class="price">${money(asset())}</div></div><div class="modal-card"><h3>판매</h3><div class="price">${state.sold}개</div></div><div class="modal-card"><h3>보유 품목</h3><div class="price">${inv().length}개</div></div></div>`}
function houseView(){modalContent.innerHTML='<h1>내 집</h1><div class="focus-card" style="text-align:center"><div style="font-size:110px;padding:50px">🏠 🛋️ 🪴 🖼️</div><h2>상인의 휴식 공간</h2><p>판매 수익으로 더 좋은 집을 꾸밀 수 있습니다.</p></div>'}
function auctionView(){const i=CATALOG[Math.floor(Math.random()*CATALOG.length)];auction={i,price:Math.round(adjusted(i)*.75),highest:'NPC',stopped:false,log:[]};renderAuction();clearInterval(auctionTimer);auctionTimer=setInterval(npcBid,1800)}
function renderAuction(){const a=auction;modalContent.innerHTML=`<h1>경매장</h1><div class="auction"><div>${imageArt(a.i)}<h2>${esc(a.i.name)}</h2><p>${esc(a.i.category)} · ${esc(a.i.rarity)}</p></div><div><div class="price">${money(a.price)}</div><p>최고 입찰자: <b>${a.highest}</b></p><div class="auction-log">${a.log.slice(-8).map(x=>'<p>'+esc(x)+'</p>').join('')}</div><div class="actions"><button class="bargain" onclick="playerBid(5)">+5%</button><button class="bargain" onclick="playerBid(12)">+12%</button><button class="sell" onclick="claim()">낙찰</button></div></div></div>`}
function npcBid(){if(!auction||auction.stopped)return;const r=Math.random();if(r<.25){auction.stopped=true;auction.log.push('NPC 입찰 종료');clearInterval(auctionTimer)}else{const p=r<.85?.04:.13,inc=Math.round(auction.price*p);auction.price+=inc;auction.highest='NPC';auction.log.push('NPC 인상 +'+money(inc))}renderAuction()}
function playerBid(p){const next=Math.round(auction.price*(1+p/100));if(state.cash<next)return toast('현금이 부족합니다.');auction.price=next;auction.highest='플레이어';auction.log.push('플레이어 입찰 '+money(next));renderAuction()}
function claim(){if(!auction.stopped)return toast('NPC 입찰이 아직 끝나지 않았습니다.');if(auction.highest!=='플레이어')return toast('현재 최고 입찰자가 아닙니다.');if(state.cash<auction.price)return toast('현금이 부족합니다.');state.cash-=auction.price;state.inventory.push(auction.i.id);state.selected=auction.i.id;save();closeModal();toast('낙찰 성공!')}
function closeModal(){modal.classList.add('hidden');clearInterval(auctionTimer)}function backdrop(e){if(e.target===modal)closeModal()}
function toast(s){toast.textContent=s;toast.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(window.__t);window.__t=setTimeout(()=>toast.classList.remove('show'),2600)}
renderAll();
</script></body></html>
